_comment: Two-phase GG1 (A2). 1D single-server Bernoulli queue, alpha_2=1 so crossover T* ~ 1/eps^2: eps=0.05->T*=400, eps=0.02->T*=2500, eps=0.01->T*=10000. T=5M gives >500x past crossover for the smallest eps, plenty of log phase. Both totalQ (=E[Q_t]) and peak_totalQ_so_far recorded for Remark 2.2 (F1) comparison. Run: python main.py configs/two_phase_gg1.json
